title: SilkSurf bench history record
description: Schema for one entry (one line) in perf/history.ndjson. The history file is newline-delimited JSON: each line is one independent JSON object that conforms to this schema. Records are append-only and ordered by timestamp.

git_sha.description: Full 40-character lowercase hex git commit SHA the run was built from.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the run, e.g. 2026-05-14T10:30:00Z. Must end in Z (Zulu / UTC).

rust_version.description: Rust toolchain version string, normally the second whitespace-separated field from `rustc --version` output (e.g. 1.94.1).

profile.description: Cargo build profile under which the bench binary was built.

metrics.description: Steady-state per-iteration measurements from the bench harness. All durations are microseconds (us) unless explicitly suffixed otherwise. Additional metric keys are allowed for forward compatibility; numeric type required where present.

fused_pipeline_us.description: Steady-state per-iteration time of the fused HTML+CSS+layout+display-list pipeline in microseconds.

css_cache_hit_us.description: Per-iteration time of a CSS parse/cache-hit lookup in microseconds.

full_render_us.description: Per-iteration time of a full render (pipeline + paint) in microseconds.

notes.description: Optional free-text annotation, e.g. environment notes, regression context, or experiment label.
